title: EU Normalized Tariff Record
description: Normalized European Union tariff record shape for Step 3 local-data ingestion.

hsCode.description: HS/CN/TARIC code normalized into the lookup contract.

mfnRate.description: MFN or erga omnes duty representation as displayed by the prototype.

preferentialRate.description: Preferential duty representation when available for the current product path.

agreement.description: Agreement or tariff-basis label presented to the user.

effectiveDate.description: Effective date or source snapshot date used by the local normalized record.
